summaryParagraphs: Mumbai-based Godrej Properties has clocked sales bookings of ₹24,008 crore in the first nine months of 2025-26, about 74% of its full-year target of ₹32,500 crore. If achieved, that would be the highest-ever annual sales by any Indian real estate developer. For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Livemint.
